Instantiable , ModelErrorHandler , MoMLExportable , Nameable , java.io.Serializable, TypedActor public class VideoPlayer extends Sink An actor that displays a AVI, Quicktime or MPEG video file. This actor accepts an ObjectToken that contains a DataSo

ctor accepts an ObjectToken that contains a DataSource. This is typically obtained from the output of the StreamLoader actor. After the model is run, a window will pop up allowing control of playing, rate of playback, and volume control. Since: Pto
